indicators.name: Floor-wood
indicators.rationale: The wooden floor provides a stable surface for stretching and yoga poses.

indicators.name: Wall-brick
indicators.rationale: The brick wall may be visually appealing but does not provide a smooth surface for yoga mats.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is moderately suitable for yoga and stretching due to the stable wooden floor, but the brick wall may not be ideal for placing yoga mats.
